piece_families: wall pipe, gauge, tank, valve, gaslight, and cable bracket dressing
floor wet drain, grate channel, steam vent, handrail, and inspection hatch dressing
ceiling pipe cluster, condensate tray, lamp cage, cable loom, and steam nozzle dressing
doorway riveted header, pressure lock, threshold drain, and side tank dressing
dependencies: Unity Package Manager local package reference
required_primary_changes: Add local package reference only after quarantine import review.
Run generator in a quarantine scene/project before any main-scene placement.
Promote generated prefabs as visual-only dressing until collision/gameplay authority is deliberately authored in main scene code.
known_risks: Current contact sheet is catalog-like and not final north-star corridor art.
Generated geometry is procedural blockout language and needs material/lighting review before player-facing promotion.
Gaslight and red accents must be reviewed so visual dressing does not imply gameplay signaling by accident.
rollback_path: remove local package reference com.brassworks.sidecar.steam-corridor-dressing-set09 and delete isolated package root
